EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not change scope "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not create scope "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not delete a scope on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed a scope on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted a scope on host {event_src.host}
